sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 50:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 50:1
items.html: The root of the four phases is called Keter. Phase one is called Hochma and phase two, Bina. Phase three is called Tifferet, or Zeir Anpin, which consists of six Sefirot of its own: Hesed, Gevura, Tifferet, Netzah, Hod, Yesod. Phase four is called Malchut.
